title: Sythed Mace pvp pack
description: This pack gives Sythe shaped mace and cool looking pvp items.
body:
# Sythed Mace pvp pack

A Minecraft Texture pack with scythe mace, metalic armors, metalic weapons and custom pvp items

### Includes -
- Mace turned in to metalic Sythe.
- Golden Seeds for Golden Apples.
- Retextured Enderpearls.
- Retextured Armors and Tools (sword, axe, picaxe, Elytra etc.)
- Clean Gui.
- White Colour Enchant glint for better shine.

You can get Better Experience with this pack. 

Example Screenshot
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e70d8ecc91427f08f3ce55f0882c0ab9a0e797e_0.webp)
